case_title: ESPINOZA, MIKE et al vs. SUTTER, RAQUEL et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, MIKE ESPINOZA, SUSIE SERVED MAR-26-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTER, RAQUEL

C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS. JUDICIAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL TAKEN BY THE COURT. JUDICIAL NOTICE OF NON ATTENDANCE BY DEFT. RAQUEL SUTTER AT SETTLEMENT CONF. ON 4/21/97 AFTER NOTICE WAS SENT TO ALL PARTIES, NOTED BY COURT. MOTION BY PLTF'S ATTY. TO MOVE TO DISMISS DEFENDANTS RAMON LUNA AND ARMONDO ROJAS AKA ARMANDO ROJAS AKA RAMON ROJAS, GRANTED BY JUDGE DESMOND. PRIMA FACIA CASE PRESENTED BY PLTF. PLTF'S WIT- NESS, S/E. PLTF'S EXHIBITS, I.D./EVID. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE AND REVIEWING THE EXHIBITS ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION, FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE AND $2,966.76 PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES. THE COURT ALSO ORDERED COST PER COST BILL.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUTTER, RAQUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 154 ELMIRA STREET / LOWER UNIT, SAN FRANCISCO $2,966.76 RENT, $128.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,094.76, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL
